name: Berättelsen om Killinggänget
overview: The comedy group Killinggänget made a big splash in the 90s with, among other things, “Nilecity” and “I manegen med Glenn Killing”. In “Berättelsen om Killinggänget” they themselves tell about their life in the 30-year-old comedy group

trailers.title: Berättelsen om Killinggänget | Official Trailer | SVT (2024)
